subject: [SO] helm chart for cnf-adapter

[SO] helm chart for cnf-adapter

Add helm chart for cnf-adapter to oom

Patch Set 11: Code-Review-1

@reddi, not sure what you're trying to do here.
In PS10, you removed in override.yaml stuff like db access, bpel user but not actuator.

but you keep db creds in secrets (seems not to be used anymore) and you don't set actuator creds...

also you remove access to requestdb adapter (either via DB or REST interface). is it normal?

As soon as you answer, I'll update the patch in order to reflect the changes

> 
> @reddi, not sure what you're trying to do here.
> In PS10, you removed in override.yaml stuff like db access, bpel user but not actuator.
> 
> but you keep db creds in secrets (seems not to be used anymore) and you don't set actuator creds...
> 
> also you remove access to requestdb adapter (either via DB or REST interface). is it normal?
> 
> As soon as you answer, I'll update the patch in order to reflect the changes

Actually that bpel username and password not required so i removed.if u want to make some changes regarding Actuator creds u can update...
